title: Host Assistance
entries: has done something similar long ago
has done it once under duress
has experience getting the right things for it
has practiced this before, and can totally help
is very smart, and can puzzle out stuff like this all the time
knows the right people to ask about it
knows where to find out more about it
knows some ancient lore about it
has some related magic for it
has authority to get help for it
owns a map or artifact crucial to the quest
can provide shelter and resources in difficult terrains
has contacts in far-off lands who might help
is adept at the skill or ability required for a challenge in the quest
has personal history or vendetta related to the quest's objective
can translate languages or decipher codes essential for the quest
possesses knowledge of secret pathways or shortcuts
has a magical item or tool that could prove vital
can provide funding or resources for the journey
is trained in combat and can offer protection
knows of rituals or ceremonies that may be needed
has access to rare ingredients or materials
can broker deals with opposing factions or groups
has a reputation that can sway locals or officials in your favor
can offer insider knowledge about traps or challenges ahead
can vouch for your character in hostile territories
has expertise in a particular domain crucial to the quest's success
can train or impart a particular skill set in a short time
can summon creatures or entities that might aid in the quest
is immune or resistant to certain challenges on the path
has old tales or songs that contain hidden clues or messages about the quest
is well-versed in the politics of regions that will be traversed, and can help navigate diplomatic issues
possesses a rare ability to communicate with specific creatures vital to the quest
knows of prophecies or foretold events related to the quest's objectives
has survived encounters with the very adversaries the character might face
can provide sanctuary or a hideout when things get dangerous
has healed or helped others who faced similar challenges and knows remedies
owns a ship, caravan, or other mode of transport that can be of assistance
has a vast network of spies or informants who can gather essential information
knows rituals or prayers to gain the favor of deities or spirits that might influence the quest's outcome
has previously faced the same quest and can provide firsthand knowledge of pitfalls to avoid
is connected to royalty or leadership and can grant audiences or meetings that might otherwise be impossible
holds influence over a group or tribe that is integral to the journey
can craft or forge essential equipment, weapons, or tools for the quest
has a collection of rare books or scrolls that might hold the answers or strategies needed
can dispel or counteract curses, hexes, or magical barriers on the journey
possesses unique sensory abilities to detect hidden threats or opportunities
can negotiate or mediate conflicts that might arise during the quest
is revered or respected in certain circles and their endorsement can open doors
has undergone similar trials and can provide emotional or mental support and guidance
